description: Fetch a Bitbucket Cloud repository issue by id. Requires the repository issue tracker. Set include_comments to also GET /issues/{id}/comments (paged). Optional page/pagelen apply when include_comments is true.

issue_id.description: Issue id from Bitbucket Cloud for this repository issue.

include_comments.description: When true, also fetch comments for this issue (paged JSON with values, page, pagelen, next).

page.description: Page number for comments when include_comments is true.

pagelen.description: Page size for comments when include_comments is true.
